title: Ginger Ray Clear Acrylic Personalisable Wedding Welcome Entrance Sign Blank Sheet
features: Gold 'Happy Birthday You Sexy Beast' Birthday Candle

Each pack contains 1 clear Acrylic Sheet at A2 size. Wonderfully versatile you can personalise as you wish- simply write, draw and design on to create a beautiful acrylic sign for you party or wedding! Why not check out our stencils (which are sold separately) to create a stylish professional finish!
Part of the Ginger Ray A Touch of Pampas Range
description: Impress your guests with a grand entrance using our Personalisable Clear Acrylic Sheet to produce a truly unique wedding welcome sign. The transparent acrylic sheet is perfect for designing custom messages. If you are feeling creative have a go at designing your own messages. Alternatively we have stencils sold separately in a variety of letters numbers fonts and sizes which will provide an easy way to achieve a professional finish to your sign.Our wedding welcome sign is versatile in design and can be tailored to any wedding theme. Why not check out our latest wedding additions with our 'A Touch of Pampas' range where you will be able to find beautiful boho wedding decorations to pair with your sign.Each pack contains:1 x A2 Clear Acrylic Sign measuring 59.4cm (W) x 42cm (L).The sign can be used as portrait or landscape
